notes:
IFC-314 — N+1 Query-Budget Detector + cross-context N+1 remediation, governed by ADR-053 (Accepted).

DETECTOR (packages/db/src/query-budget/): AsyncLocalStorage request-scoped store (context.ts: runWithQueryBudget / recordQuery / getQueryBudgetSnapshot / measureQueries), config (config.ts: DEFAULT_QUERY_BUDGET=15, resolveMode observe-everywhere with throw strictly opt-in via QUERY_BUDGET_MODE=throw, budgetForRoute, DEFAULT_BACKGROUND_QUERY_BUDGET=50 + resolveBackgroundBudget), a Prisma-free $allOperations hook (extension.ts: instrumentOperation + queryBudgetExtension), and a swappable structured-event reporter (reporter.ts: setQueryBudgetEmitter restore-handle, QueryBudgetExceededError, reportOverBudget — background contexts NEVER throw). Wired in client.ts via Prisma.defineExtension composed AFTER fieldEncryptionExtension so encrypted-model ops are counted too.

SEEDING: apps/api/src/tracing/middleware.ts wraps next() in runWithQueryBudget (context='request', budgetForRoute(route), requestId adopted from the incoming x-request-id header) and surfaces the snapshot onto the OTel span (db.query.count / db.query.budget / db.query.over_budget / db.query.repeated_fingerprints), and an app-layer OTel metrics emitter (apps/api/src/tracing/query-budget-otel.ts, installed once from startTracing()) forwards over-budget events to an intelliflow.db.query.budget.exceeded counter + intelliflow.db.query.budget.queries histogram (keyed by route/context/method) while preserving the structured warn line. apps/ai-worker/src/ai-worker.ts processJob wraps work in runWithQueryBudget (context='background', resolveBackgroundBudget). apps/web/proxy.ts mints/propagates x-request-id (defensively guarded for partial test request mocks); apps/web/src/app/providers.tsx attaches x-request-id on both httpBatchLink header functions.

SCANNER: tools/scripts/nplus1-scan.mjs (TypeScript compiler API) + line-drift-resistant baseline (tools/scripts/nplus1-baseline.json, 26 signatures / 23 sites) fails CI on NEW high-confidence violations only; added as a required step in .github/workflows/ci.yml after Lint (no continue-on-error).

REMEDIATION: 56 audited findings (1 Critical / 10 High / 24 Medium / 21 Low). 45 real N+1 fixed across bounded contexts in TDD batches B1-B9 (bulk tRPC, deal bulk/contract, settings, home/analytics, legal documents, AI/intelligence, background jobs, quick-parallel, low-deferred) via the smallest safe refactor — findByIds/IN-clause batching, grouped per-tenant findMany, and parameterized recursive CTEs (PrismaCaseDocumentRepository version chains). 11 findings documented as bounded/intentional non-N+1; 7 verified false positives documented separately. No new unsafe raw SQL: all $queryRaw uses Prisma.sql parameterization; the case-document CTEs UNION ALL only (id, parent_version_id) text/uuid columns (pattern-conformance Team 4 @no-enum-union opt-out, no enum types unioned).

AUDIT-FIX ITERATION (2026-05-31): closed the 4 review findings — (1) HIGH background detector now actually seeds ai-worker job entry; (2) MEDIUM per-tenant fan-out in account-scoring.job.ts / entity-insight.job.ts collapsed into ONE grouped findMany (in {in: enabledTenantIds}) + in-memory cap-by-tenant; (3) MEDIUM scanner now gates CI; (4) MEDIUM x-request-id now propagates boundary->API->query-budget events. Also fixed a flaky next-best-action.agent.test.ts (mocked @intelliflow/db prisma to stop a real SASL hang under load) and a pre-existing date-rollover bug in ComplianceTimeline.navigateMonth (surfaced on month-end dates) by anchoring the day to 1 before shifting the month. Added detector tests for the default console.warn emitter, the setQueryBudgetEmitter restore handle, and the queryBudgetExtension factory to lift function coverage to 100%.

COMPLEXITY REFACTOR (2026-05-31): five functions whose IFC-314 changes pushed them over the sonar cognitive-complexity budget (15) were refactored with behaviour-identical helper extractions — apps/api/src/tracing/middleware.ts (applyQueryBudgetToSpan), apps/api/src/modules/account/account.router.ts (computeBulkReassignVerdicts + buildBulkReassignResponse), apps/api/src/modules/home/home.router.ts (buildProactiveNotificationCandidates), apps/ai-worker/src/workers/ticket-sla-monitor.job.ts (groupByTenantCapped + evaluateTenantTickets), apps/ai-worker/src/workers/case-deadline-monitor.job.ts (flushPriorityBumps). lint:sonar:guard now exits 0; the touched-module suites stay green (api account/home/tracing 449/449, ai-worker workers 140/140). Hexagonal boundary preserved (domain imports zero infra; new ports are domain interfaces with Prisma impls in adapters). Detector is observe/report-only in production. All four validations (TypeScript/Tests/Lint/Build) re-run green post-refactor on the integration branch (stdout hashes recorded above); this commit is authored on feat/ifc-314-nplus1 off origin/main (38ef62284) carrying only the IFC-314 delta (no IFC-156/property/CI changes — verified zero-overlap with origin/main..HEAD).
